title: Enhanced 3D printed support block
abstract: Support blocks for printed circuit boards (PCB's) and printed circuit board assemblies (PCBA's), wherein the support blocks are produced from a 3D printing process. The support block including a bottom surface having a vacuum connection; a top surface having at least one vacuum hole; at least one recessed surface that is offset from the top surface; and at least one vacuum channel extending from the vacuum connection to the at least one vacuum hole.
claims: 1. A 3D printed support block comprising: a bottom surface having a vacuum connection; a top surface having at least one vacuum hole; at least one recessed area having at least one surface that is offset from the top surface; at least one vacuum channel extending from the vacuum connection to the at least one vacuum hole, wherein the 3D printed support block, when in use during a manufacturing process, directly contacts an article to be supported during the manufacturing process; and a magnet channel extending from the top surface or the at least one surface of the at least one recessed area towards the bottom surface.
